assertion_results.text: The answer recommends `@pytest.mark.parametrize` for the repeated input cases
The answer shows or describes a table of input and expected values in one focused test
The answer avoids recommending many near-duplicate test functions for each case
assertion_results.evidence:
It proposes parameterized tests rather than separate functions per case, offering either two focused parameterized tests (valid vs invalid) or a single parameterized table:
- "Option A: Separate tests, simplest and clear" with @pytest.mark.parametrize used for inputs.
- "Option B: Single table with expected outcome" using @pytest.mark.parametrize with (email, expected).
